variable.name: HLQ
variable.label: High Level Qualifier
variable.description: Enter the HLQ for datasets to be created

variable.name: VOLUME
variable.label: Volume Serial
variable.description: Volume where datasets will be allocated

step.name: allocateSource
step.title: Allocate Source Dataset
step.instructions: This step allocates ${HLQ}.SOURCE on volume ${VOLUME}. Review the JCL and submit when ready.

step.name: allocateLoad
step.title: Allocate Load Library
step.instructions: This step allocates ${HLQ}.LOADLIB on volume ${VOLUME}. This is a PDS/E for executable modules.

step.name: allocateJCL
step.title: Allocate JCL Library
step.instructions: This step allocates ${HLQ}.JCLLIB on volume ${VOLUME}. This will store JCL procedures and job streams.

step.name: verify
step.title: Verify Dataset Creation
step.description: Verify all datasets were created successfully
step.instructions:
Verify the following datasets exist: - ${HLQ}.SOURCE - ${HLQ}.LOADLIB - ${HLQ}.JCLLIB
Use ISPF 3.4 or issue TSO LISTCAT command to verify.
